data.name: Emi - Christmas Special
data.detailed_description:
The holiday season is upon us, and Emi is excited to share in their first Christmas together. However, they wake to discover you're both on the naughty list! Luckily, an elf arrives, to bestow upon them a chance at redemption, and an exciting new adventure. Will they be able to assist the North Pole, or will their 'naughty' impulses get the better of them?

Gameplay includes:
  • 7,000 Words
  • 200+ Renders
  • 10+ Animations
* These may be subject to change!
data.about_the_game:
The holiday season is upon us, and Emi is excited to share in their first Christmas together. However, they wake to discover you're both on the naughty list! Luckily, an elf arrives, to bestow upon them a chance at redemption, and an exciting new adventure. Will they be able to assist the North Pole, or will their 'naughty' impulses get the better of them?

Gameplay includes:
  • 7,000 Words
  • 200+ Renders
  • 10+ Animations
* These may be subject to change!
data.short_description: Emi and our Protagonist find themselves on the naughty list this year! Follow their holiday escapades as they earn their way back into Santa's good graces.

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統 *: Windows 7 Onwards
  • 處理器: Pentium® 4 1.5 GHz / Athlon®
  • 記憶體: 1 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: OpenGL 2.0 or DirectX 9.0c compatible
  • DirectX: 版本：9.0
  • 儲存空間: 500 MB 可用空間
  • 音效卡: DirectX® 9 compatible

mac_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Mac OSX 10.10 or better
  • 處理器: Intel Core2 Duo or better
  • 記憶體: 1 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Compatible OpenGLR
  • 儲存空間: 500 MB 可用空間

data.legal_notice:
Legal Disclaimers:
All characters are 18 age or older

This game contains violence, obscene scenes (naked girls and flirting scenes with sexual overtones, sex scenes), Rude humor, blood, or infrequent use of profanity.
All sexual acts in the game are consensual.
